compiled_state.title: Remove .tickets/ v2 search from check-validation-failures.sh and record-review.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Remove v2 directory search from check-validation-failures.sh and v2 path exclusion from compute-diff-hash.sh.

## check-validation-failures.sh

The hook currently searches the v2 flat-file tickets dir (TICKETS_DIR defaulting to the old .tickets path) using grep. Remove this entire directory search since the v2 directory no longer exists.

Changes:
1. Remove TICKETS_DIR variable and default assignment (line ~76)
2. Remove grep-based FOUND search loop over TICKETS_DIR (lines ~148-154)
3. Remove TITLE_MATCH exact-match search over TICKETS_DIR (lines ~162-167)
4. Keep UNTRACKED logging to artifacts dir (log untracked failures) and the agent-facing CSV output
5. All failed categories will now be UNTRACKED (correct — v3 issue search is not grep-based)

## compute-diff-hash.sh

Remove the v2 exclusion entry from the diff hash computation (line ~114). Keep any v3 exclusion entries.

## TDD Requirement
Tests from 014f-a652 must pass after this change.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] check-validation-failures.sh no longer sets TICKETS_DIR or searches a flat-file directory
  Verify: ! grep -q 'TICKETS_DIR\|grep -rl.*TICKETS_DIR' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh

- [ ] compute-diff-hash.sh no longer excludes the v2 flat-file path from hash computation
  Verify: ! grep -q "':!\.tickets/\*\*'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh

- [ ] check-validation-failures.sh still produces agent-facing UNTRACKED output for failed categories
  Verify: echo 'failed\nfailed_checks=tests' > /tmp/test-cvf-status && ARTIFACTS_DIR=/tmp bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-validation-failures.sh < /dev/null 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Untracked' || true

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 9
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
